CustomField.description: Stores the 18-character Record Type ID used when NPPatch creates Household Accounts. This is automatically set when you select a Household Account Record Type in Settings. If blank, new Household Accounts use the running user's default Account Record Type. Only relevant when using the Household Account model.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Record Type ID for Household Accounts. If blank, new Household Accounts use the user's default Account Record Type.
CustomField.label: Household Account Record Type
